name: publishready
description: PublishReady: Turn AI drafts into publish-ready writing.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@veldica/publishready-schemas && npm run build --workspace=@veldica/publishready-core && npm run build --workspace=@veldica/publishready-cli && npm run build --workspace=@veldica/publishready-mcp
scripts.test: npm run build && vitest run tests/
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace=@veldica/publishready-schemas && npm run typecheck --workspace=@veldica/publishready-core && npm run typecheck --workspace=@veldica/publishready-cli && npm run typecheck --workspace=@veldica/publishready-mcp && npm run typecheck --workspace=@veldica/publishready-schemas
scripts.release:dry-run: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm pack --workspace=@veldica/publishready-mcp --dry-run

author: Writing Metrics MCP Contributors
